---
title: About Me
image: images/roadtrip.jpg

about:
    id: hero-heading
    template: templates/solana-extra/solana.ejs.html 
    image-shape: rounded
    image-width: 15em
    image-alt: "NeuroShepherd placeholder image of an AI-generated German shepherd dog"
    image-title: Somewhere along I-80 in in Nevada, USA
    image-caption: testing
    links:
    - icon: book
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-1769-7580
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/NeuroShepherd
format:
  html:
    grid:
      body-width: 1000px
---

:::{#hero-heading}

I'm a statistical programmer and epidemiologist. My work focuses on building tools to simplify and improve the analysis of research data, spreading open science practices, and improving reproducibility in research.

I tend to do statistics in R, create deployment projects in Python/SQL and distribute with Docker, and I write about statistics and simulations from time to time.

## Tools & Skills

**Languages:** R, Python, SQL, Go, HTML/CSS

**Areas:** Statistical modeling, simulation, data visualization, R package development, web scraping


:::

## Experience


::: {.d-none .d-md-block}

| Company | Location | Role & Responsibilities |
|---------|----------|------------------------|
| LMU Open Science Center | Munich, Germany | Developer: create [technical solutions](https://github.com/lmu-osc) for open science and reproducible research |
| Boehringer Ingelheim | Biberach, Germany | Master's Thesis: [*RECIST 1.1: An Analysis of the Classification Stability of a Tumor Measurement Scale in Oncology Clinical Trials*](https://neuroshepherd.github.io/masters-thesis/) |
| Novartis Pharma | Basel, Switzerland | Internship: development of R package risk assessment tools and Shiny applications |
| LMU IBE | Munich, Germany | Research Assistant: development of [**{ordinalsimr}**](https://neuroshepherd.github.io/ordinalsimr/) R package for simulating ordinal outcomes data |



:::

::: {.d-md-none}

<div class="experience-card">
  <div class="experience-company">LMU Open Science Center</div>
  <div class="experience-location">Munich, Germany</div>
  <div class="experience-position">Developer</div>
  <div class="experience-role">Creating [technical solutions](https://github.com/lmu-osc) for open science and reproducible research</div>
</div>

<div class="experience-card">
  <div class="experience-company">Boehringer Ingelheim</div>
  <div class="experience-location">Biberach, Germany</div>
  <div class="experience-position">Master's Thesis Candidate</div>
  <div class="experience-role">[*RECIST 1.1: An Analysis of the Classification Stability of a Tumor Measurement Scale in Oncology Clinical Trials*](https://neuroshepherd.github.io/masters-thesis/)</div>
</div>

<div class="experience-card">
  <div class="experience-company">Novartis Pharma</div>
  <div class="experience-location">Basel, Switzerland</div>
  <div class="experience-position">Intern</div>
  <div class="experience-role">Development of R package risk assessment tools and Shiny applications</div>
</div>

<div class="experience-card">
  <div class="experience-company">LMU IBE</div>
  <div class="experience-location">Munich, Germany</div>
  <div class="experience-position">Research Assistant</div>
  <div class="experience-role">Development of [**{ordinalsimr}**](https://neuroshepherd.github.io/ordinalsimr/) R package for simulating ordinal outcomes data</div>
</div>

:::
